backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining Match and Transaction types, a static match list, wallet balance state, and query/update methods for matches, balance, and transactions, with blob storage mixin and migration support.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms the old actor state (matches only) into the new actor state by adding an initial zero balance and empty transactions list.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (wallet route, WalletPage component, useWallet hook) to their source files, components, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference index for the project's frontend components, hooks, pages, and configuration.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base CSS file defining OKLCH-based light and dark theme CSS custom properties for colors, borders, and UI tokens used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Elite Gaming Hub app, mounting the React app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with three routes (/, /registration, /wallet) sharing a RootLayout that keeps the Header always visible via Outlet.
frontend/src/components/ConfirmationModa: Success dialog modal displayed after payment submission, showing a check icon, match details (game mode, entry fee, prize pool), and player registration info (In-Game Name and Player ID).
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Fixed top navigation header with the Elite Gaming Hub logo linking to home, a Wallet icon/link to /wallet, and a profile avatar button, all styled with neon-red accents.
frontend/src/components/MatchCard.tsx: Renders a single match card with game mode, entry fee, prize pool, and status, navigating to the registration page with match context stored in sessionStorage on join.
frontend/src/components/MatchList.tsx: Fetches and displays a grid of MatchCards using live data, falling back to static match data on error or empty results, with a refresh button.
frontend/src/components/MatchListSkeleto: Renders a grid of four skeleton placeholder cards mimicking the MatchCard layout for use during loading states.
frontend/src/components/PaymentModal.tsx: Modal dialog that displays a UPI ID for payment, allows uploading a payment screenshot, and submits the payment data for a given match registration.
frontend/src/components/RegistrationModa: Modal dialog form that collects and validates a player's in-game name and player ID before submitting registration data for a match.
frontend/src/components/TournamentBanner: Auto-advancing image carousel banner showcasing tournament slides with title, prize pool, and navigation controls, cycling every 5 seconds.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication on ICP, managing login/logout state, identity persistence, and AuthClient creation with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines TanStack Query hooks for fetching matches, wallet balance, and transactions, plus a mutation hook for adding transactions via the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Tailwind and Google Fonts (Rajdhani, Orbitron), defining CSS custom properties for a dark neon-red theme, and utility classes for glow effects, shimmer, and animations.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/RegistrationPage.tsx: A registration form page where users enter their in-game name and player ID to join a match, reading match context from sessionStorage and validating inputs before proceeding.
frontend/src/pages/WalletPage.tsx: Wallet page displaying the user's balance and transaction history fetched from the backend, with modal dialogs for adding money or withdrawing funds.
frontend/src/types/registration.ts: TypeScript type definitions for the registration flow, including player registration data, payment data, and the multi-step flow state shape.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with Orbitron/Rajdhani fonts, a neon-red color palette using oklch values, custom box shadows, and accordion animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the project state (version 17) for 'Elite Gaming Hub', a Free Fire tournament app, including architectural notes, known issues, and a list of implemented features with their requirements.
